rows.label: qev035703_MSG0001
rows.name: Are you BLADEs still shooting it out with the Growth as usual?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035703_MSG0002
rows.name:
Lately, Team Slovity has been
going on expeditions and striking them down in various regions too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035703_MSG0003
rows.name:
How should I put it, a battle to win our freedom...
This kind of honorable battle is really nice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035703_MSG0004
rows.name:
Please, help Captain Slovity.
She puts on that cheerful front, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035703_MSG0005
rows.name:
because they hurt us before,
she deeply hates the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035703_MSG0006
rows.name:
She might lose herself in the heat of the moment
and show an opening to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035703_MSG0007
rows.name:
So, I need you to stay calm... and protect the Captain.
With my strength, I can't stop the Captain, but
I'm sure you could hold her back.[ST:wait ]
